query: File a Jira ticket for this bug — the invoice row click throws a 404, here's the stack trace
note: Operator reports a bug to become a trackable Jira issue with evidence.

query: Can you write up this feature request as a story in PROJ so an agent can pick it up without asking questions?
note: Feature request -> groomed Jira story with the six-section dispatchable format.

query: make a Jira ticket for that
note: explicit Jira cue disambiguates from gh-issue-filing

query: We've got a backlog of stub issues in Jira that need triage before we dispatch anything — classify them as ready, needs-input, or blocked
note: Queue triage / recon classification into terminal triage states is the filing skill's recon protocol.

query: I found some adjacent broken behavior while working PROJ-88 — should I just expand the PR or file something?
note: Discovered mid-task work must become a follow-up issue, not scope creep.

query: Split this multi-theme report into separate Jira issues, each one independently dispatchable
note: One-theme-per-issue splitting before filing is core filing-skill guidance.

query: Draft the description for PROJ-204 with verified file:line refs and literal acceptance criteria
note: Authoring the groomed six-section description with evidence is exactly this skill.

query: Triage this stub on Atlassian with the cheap model and emit the RECON OK contract line
note: Sandboxed cheap-model recon-triage with the machine-parseable output contract lives here.

query: An operator pasted a console error — turn it into a properly groomed issue with reproduction steps
note: Error paste -> trackable groomed issue; classic intake-to-filing path.

query: Lock PROJ-123 before you dispatch an agent at it
note: Claiming/locking before dispatch is the locking sibling, not filing.

query: Set this Jira issue to Highest priority and add the agent-effort-high label
note: Setting Priority/effort labels is the fields control-plane skill, not filing.

query: File a GitHub issue for this crash using the gh CLI
note: GitHub-tracker phrasing must route to the gh-* sibling, not the Jira filing skill.

query: Open an issue on GitHub and label it a bug — make a ticket for the team
note: Cross-tracker confuser: 'make a ticket' but explicitly GitHub -> gh-issue-filing.

query: This raw story isn't dev-ready — interactively groom it with the lead until the intent is clear
note: Interactive lead-driven grooming of a not-ready issue is grooming-issues, not filing.

query: Recon PROJ-310 — trace it into the code, give me an implementation approach and LoE estimate
note: Dev-side recon producing approach + LoE is technical-recon, distinct from intake-triage filing.

query: Why is this Jira issue still open even though its PR merged last week?
note: Release-and-transition-on-merge question belongs to the locking skill.

query: Deep-dive the whole repo and write living spec docs for the domains you find
note: Whole-codebase recon into living specs is spelunking-specs, unrelated to issue filing.

query: Convert the Q3 budget spreadsheet into a formatted xlsx with totals per region
note: Truly unrelated spreadsheet task — no issue-tracker work at all.
